item.title: If only....
item.description: After seeing the attempted gang bang, I was left fuming. Seeing this for real would've been wonderful. The whole world saw this disgrace. America, who are you now? Shame shame shame. *wags finger

item.dc:creator: Harryharry11

item.title: We need more Carl Sagans and fewer village idiots.
item.description:
Cold War spending
Probably of worst case
How is climate change different? Because there is no industry built on fear mongering. Most politicians today don’t listen to their constituents, they listen to money, and the ones who do can be swayed. I really hope we get through these trying times and regain control of America from the oligarchs that are taking root in a timely manner. I hope we get more people like Carl Sagan, Bernie Sanders, AOC and all the others who care about the future of the country and the world and not the future of their stock portfolios. This_is_not_fine.jpg #Carl_Sagan #global_warming #climate_change
item.dc:creator: rakudaniku

item.title: To: America. From: The world.

item.title: Cat Dump-ilation: Just cats, only cats, pure cat stuff
item.description:
I like these because they feel like the way cats just insinuate themselves into so many aspect of our lives.
cat tax. My frined's new bebe! Raja
Everyone, say it with me. "Oh, big streatch for such a little cat."
Slow Blink: Sophie Tax

item.title: Here we go again.
item.description: On the beaches, on the landing grounds. In the fields, and in the streets. In the hills. Wherever they are.

item.title: What Happened Today #28
item.description: Share with your people – today’s upheavals shook the system: from explosive White House confrontations with a world leaders and sweeping policy reversals to legal battles and grassroots protests, the landscape is shifting fast. #resist #GovBriefToday LINKS 1 - https://www.cbsnews.com/news/ukraine-rare-earth-minerals-trump-zelenskyy/ 2 - https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/democrats-decry-republicans-applaud-trumps-confrontation-zelenskyy/story?id=119305519 3 - https://kvia.com/news/border/2025/02/28/hegseth-suggests-unilateral-military-action-to-mexican-leaders-reports-say/ 4 - https://www.npr.org/2025/03/01/g-s1-51490/federal-workers-new-email-accomplishments 5 - https://www.axios.com/2025/02/28/rfk-kills-public-comment-health-policy 6 - https://apnews.com/article/trump-declare-english-official-language-5b24f6ac1172803f615cea69e13f8724 7 - https://www.spokesman.com/stories/2025/feb/28/irs-rejected-request-for-addresses-of-people-belie/ 8 - https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/5169380-national-democrats-sue-trump-executive-order/ 9 - https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/news/politics/2025/02/28/kim-reynolds-signs-law-removing-gender-identity-protections-from-iowa-civil-rights-act-sf-418/80576830007/ 10 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/justice-department/jan-6-prosecutors-demoted-trump-appointed-us-attorney-washington-rcna194278 11 - https://www.wvtm13.com/article/trump-hud-fair-housing-grants-cut/63983580 12 - https://www.nytimes.com/2025/02/28/us/politics/education-department-buyout-email.html FIGHTING BACK: https://www.sfgate.com/california-parks/article/california-joshua-tree-flag-protests-20194550.php ARCHIVE: https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.description: If Dumb and Dumber are Russia's best negotiators Putin is in real trouble ....
item.dc:creator: Xalten2

item.title: 15 Awesome and Useful websites
item.description:
Radio Garden lets you explore live radio stations around the world by spinning a globe https://radio.garden/
This website provide a temporary, disposable email address https://10minutemail.com/
Meow.Camera , a collection of livestreams of automatic feeders for streetcats in Japan https://meow.camera/viewer/
Ytch turns YouTube content into a vintage TV experience https://ytch.xyz/
This website shows popular products that are at their lowest price with AI powered alerts https://pricedive.ai/
Nobody.live shows twitch streams with zero viewers http://nobody.live/
Download Older video games no longer sold or supported by their creators https://www.myabandonware.com/
This website lets you write an email to yourself, delivered at a future date https://www.futureme.org/
Wayback machine archives web pages, providing snapshots of websites at different points in time http://wayback.archive.org/
This website tracks live air traffic around the world, Even you can track government planes https://www.flightradar24.com/
It's a shadow library that provides free access to scholarly articles and academic books https://libgen.mx/
Ninite puts a package of software you choose into one and installs it all for you. http://ninite.com/
Photopea is a free, online image editor that supports various file formats, similar to photoshop https://www.photopea.com/
A project archiving abandoned video games from the 1970s until now https://oldgamesdownload.com/
Website provides free access to millions of research papers and scholarly articles often bypassing paywalls https://www.sci-hub.ru/
item.dc:creator: whythereisnoheadday

item.description: So apparently the bounty is worth ¥100,000 (about US $663.93). https://indianexpress.com/article/trending/trending-globally/japanese-ramen-shop-puts-bounty-on-customers-who-left-negative-reviews-9851300/ https://nypost.com/2025/02/22/lifestyle/toyojiro-ramen-shop-placed-bounty-on-heads-of-customers-who-left-bad-review/

item.title: I have too many memes: Dump #88 bisexuality and rpgs
item.dc:creator: Sweenerd

item.title: Pippin the fool of a Took
item.description:
She was found alone in a car engine when she weighed less than 1 lb. Just a baby so so smol. I took her in and I was honestly terrified of her because I’ve never had a kitten before let alone one that was so young. But this little one is resilient. She loves to perch right on my shoulder like this whenever she can :)
She was quite possibly the cutest thing I’ve ever seen.
Teeny tiniest toe beans
This little lady was 5.6lbs at the vet this week. She’s the cuddliest sweetest little kitty and I’m so lucky to have found her.
item.dc:creator: clammyganon

item.title: I lived 25 years of my life in the grips of an eating disorder. Lately I’ve begun building my body, a tiny bit of confidence, a little wedge of peace. I’d all but given up hope of healing, and, my god, does it feel fragile, but I think it’s happening
item.description:
Today
About eighteen months ago
item.dc:creator: mehismyname

item.title: Be vewy vewy quiet. I'm hawvesting Tibewium.
item.description: One vision one purpose! The technology of peace! Peace through power! Peace through power!
item.dc:creator: BerryBnuuy

item.title: No plan survives first contact with implementation
item.description: I realized that I don't have many hobbies (is gaming a hobby?) and I realized that I have stopped exploring new things, for years now, and I'm living a boring life. So. I asked ChatGpt to give me some hobbies and it gave me 20. I plan to explore them during the next 20 weekends and to help me stick to that plan, I'm going to post each weekend a summary of how it went. This weekend, its photography .... wish me luck ... none of my plans ever survive first contact.
item.dc:creator: deathisthedestination

item.title: I just finished this big nocturne oil painting
item.description: I had a nice late night painting session on this big nocturne last night, and I think I’m calling it done. 24x36” oil on linen.
item.dc:creator: PilotBuilder

item.title: Please
item.description: I know I've done it too, but at this point, imgur is becoming 95% politics. I want to get away from that sometimes. We all do. Please tag your post Edit: If you forgot how to tag, you can do it both before and after you submit a post. Just click on "add tag" and type in your tag. Edit 2: Some of you are acting like Trump supporters. Instead of doing good for the community, you would rather do good for your ego I'm not trying to silence you. It would just be nice to not see stressful shit every. Single. Day. Yeah, some days I don't mind reading politics, but other days, I want to not see orange turd doing something that embarrasses the rest of us
item.dc:creator: CaptainCaptObvious

item.title: It's hard to not become a misanthrope with how things are going on the planet right now.
item.description: Part of my core build, my very nature, is to expect the best from people. A prevailing belief that people are good. The evidence against it seems overwhelming. I'm starting to wonder sometimes if it's not a flaw, if I shouldn't actively force myself to stop giving a shit and embrace contempt. I won't, but the despair really wears you down sometimes.
item.dc:creator: cannibalthemusical
